$comment: Source of truth for the embedded coaching-observation block (docs/coaching-history.md; ROADMAP §Coaching Deepening → Coaching History and Pattern Recognition). ONE block per surfaced cross-session process pattern, carried ONLY in the single [Project]_Coaching_History_[runlabel].md artifact (H5 single-home; the coach reads the same file the writer holds — Fable condition a). A coaching observation is a rolling, opt-in, local-only, DESCRIPTIVE claim about the writer's PROCESS, mechanically derived from recorded session history (a count over finding_disposition / finding_states records, never a vibe) — it is orthogonal to the editorial severity scale (deliberately NO `severity` field and NO nested apodictic:finding block; H4 leak guard), so it never launders a manuscript verdict. Validated by scripts/apodictic_artifacts.py — a stdlib SUBSET JSON-Schema checker (required / const / enum / type / array minItems / pattern) — via scripts/coaching_history.py (validate.sh coaching-history). The per-pattern count FLOORS the subset checker cannot express (deferral-recurrence >=3, phase-incompletion >=2; the schema keeps the global minimum >=2) are enforced in coaching_history.py H1, as revision_arc.py enforces its nested phase shape. `closed_keys:true` — a coaching observation carries an exact, closed key set (the mis-spelled-field kill; and a stray `severity`/`finding`-shaped key cannot slip in).
title: APODICTIC coaching observation (apodictic.coaching_observation.v1)

id.$comment: Coaching-History ID: CH-<NN>. Durable + unique per project (the counter lives in the sidecar as `coaching_history_seq`, a scalar-in-sidecar like execution.state_version); uniqueness within the artifact is checked by H1. Boundary-guarded elsewhere by H5's bare-token scan (the FID_RE style), so it never collides with a real F-CH-01 finding id.

pattern.$comment: Closed enum, v1. deferral-recurrence: the same finding carried `deferred` across an unbroken run of finding_disposition.session ordinals. phase-incompletion: a revision_arc phase stayed uncompleted across consecutive sessions. stuck-point-cluster / completion-drift deferred to v2 (they need a session-plan / stuck-family taxonomy that does not exist yet).

count.$comment: The mechanical streak length the observation claims. Per-pattern FLOORS (deferral-recurrence >=3, phase-incompletion >=2 — CLOSED by the Fable verdict 2026-07-05) are enforced in coaching_history.py H1; the schema keeps only the global >=2.

evidence.$comment: Each item is a resolvable reference in the documented evidence grammar: `<F-id> deferred @ session <n>` (deferral-recurrence) or `phase <label> incomplete @ session <n>` (phase-incompletion). H2 requires len(evidence) >= count, every reference to resolve against the recorded records, and the cited session ordinals to be actually consecutive. The `@ session` token is coaching-history-specific — distinct from the pinned finding-disposition marker grammar (`<!-- deferred: F-… until: … -->`) — so H5 can scan for it outside the artifact without colliding with legitimate Coaching-Log disposition markers.

observation.$comment: Writer-facing descriptive prose (H3-scanned for prescriptive / trait-blame framing). Surfaces the pattern; never diagnoses, prescribes, predicts, or grades the writer.
